stemHtml: What is the statement describing the effect of ionosperic delay and satellite clock errors on the position of an aircraft using NAVSTAR GPS without augmentation?

options.a: Satellite clock error affects the position, but the ionospheric delay is more significant.
options.b: The ionospheric delay affects the position, but satellite clock error is more significant.
options.c: Neither ionospheric delay NOR satellite clock error gives significant position errors.
options.d: Satellite clocks are so accurate that their contribution to the position error is zero.
